---
layout: default
title: "Daily News Brief: Dumka and Jharkhand (June 27, 2026)"
date: 2026-06-27T04:37:12.997548+00:00
summary: "Gold smuggling bust, Ranchi attack arrests, power sector funding, and educational reforms headline today's Jharkhand news"
run_time_ist: "10:07AM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Dumka Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 10:07AM</p>

<h2 class="section-title">Dumka and Nearby</h2>
<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Liquor seizure:</strong> Bounsi police arrested a woman traveling on a bus on the Bhagalpur-Dumka route for carrying illegal liquor.</li>
  <li><strong>Religious observance:</strong> MLA Basant Soren performed Shringar Puja at Baba Basukinath Dham.</li>
</ul>
<h2 class="section-title">Jharkhand</h2>
<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Gold smuggling:</strong> The DRI busted a gold smuggling syndicate, seizing 15 kg of foreign-origin gold and arresting 15 individuals.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">J1</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Ranchi attack:</strong> A Special Investigation Team (SIT) arrested two suspects in connection with the petrol bomb attack on the Ranchi RSS office.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxOczFrZHFJajlhNm5CdUM2TFd4NjY2QTd3TXZKamo4ZHpSLWpQTFdMUnVzbk8zUjd5RnJCLXE0d29XN3BnOVM1MGRqbHFsV1dwV3hFdXQzdDVxUEs0UDdvZzZGN3daNlRRV0M0bTBmajZXam5GaHAxUjZvWFNlaHJiNWNYSndFdktYMDRaVkJiT29sMmIxNXpLNXJsMXVuYnZMODlSMEoxRlFtWHM?oc=5">J2</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Power sector funding:</strong> Jharkhand has received ₹7,600 crore in funding, with a directive to convert all government electricity meters to prepaid by August 31.</li>
  <li><strong>Education reform:</strong> Starting the 2026-30 academic session, science streams in Ranchi will be restricted to only three government colleges under a new policy.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">J4</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxOczFrZHFJajlhNm5CdUM2TFd4NjY2QTd3TXZKamo4ZHpSLWpQTFdMUnVzbk8zUjd5RnJCLXE0d29XN3BnOVM1MGRqbHFsV1dwV3hFdXQzdDVxUEs0UDdvZzZGN3daNlRRV0M0bTBmajZXam5GaHAxUjZvWFNlaHJiNWNYSndFdktYMDRaVkJiT29sMmIxNXpLNXJsMXVuYnZMODlSMEoxRlFtWHM?oc=5">J2</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Weather impact:</strong> Lightning and storms across the state have resulted in fatalities, contributing to a broader regional weather crisis.</li>
</ul>
